[[BLOCK:slide7_shape1]]
Lavery et al. (2016) stated: "Traditional methods (e.g., bivariate screening, stepwise selection, forward selection) have limitations. The statistics provided in regression outputs (p-values, parameter estimates, R-squared (R平方 (R Square)), etc.) were developed to test a specific model, and their application is unfounded when used repeatedly, as in Stepwise Regression (逐步回归 (Stepwise Regression))" (p. 1).
